requirement_topic.en: Zimbabwe Market Access — SAZ Conformity, ZERA / ZETDC Project Gates, and Nascent EV Demand
requirement_topic.zh: 津巴布韦市场准入——SAZ符合性、ZERA / ZETDC项目门槛及早期EV需求
requirement_topic.zht: 辛巴威市場准入——SAZ符合性、ZERA / ZETDC項目門檻及早期EV需求

summary.en: Zimbabwe's EV charging market is very nascent, and official sources do not show a single dedicated national EVSE certification regulation as of 2026-06-14. Exporters should still treat SAZ conformity, IEC-based product evidence, ZERA electricity-sector requirements, and ZETDC connection conditions as separate gates. For imports, the exact HS code, charger rating, radio or smart-meter functions, cable and connector accessories, labels, and importer obligations should be verified before shipment. For projects, grid reliability and load-shedding can be as important as product certificates, especially for public DC chargers.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦电动汽车充电市场仍处于非常早期，截至2026年6月14日，官方来源未显示存在单一、专门的全国性EVSE认证法规。出口商仍应将SAZ符合性、IEC体系产品证据、ZERA电力行业要求和ZETDC接入条件视为相互独立的门槛。进口方面，应在出货前核实具体HS编码、充电桩额定值、无线或智能计量功能、电缆和接口附件、标签以及进口商义务。项目方面，电网可靠性和限电影响可能与产品证书同样重要，尤其是公共直流充电桩。
summary.zht: 辛巴威電動汽車充電市場仍處於非常早期，截至2026年6月14日，官方來源未顯示存在單一、專門的全國性EVSE認證法規。出口商仍應將SAZ符合性、IEC體系產品證據、ZERA電力行業要求和ZETDC接入條件視為相互獨立的門檻。進口方面，應在出貨前核實具體HS編碼、充電樁額定值、無線或智能計量功能、電纜和接口附件、標籤以及進口商義務。項目方面，電網可靠性和限電影響可能與產品證書同樣重要，尤其是公共直流充電樁。

standards_or_laws: SAZ standards and conformity-assessment route for electrical equipment, where applicable
ZERA electricity-sector regulation and project requirements
ZETDC project-specific connection and commissioning conditions
IEC 61851, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000 evidence where adopted, specified, or requested

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification applying where the charger falls within CCC scope. China CCC or GB/T test evidence may support engineering review, but it does not establish Zimbabwe SAZ acceptance, ZERA compliance, ZETDC connection approval, or IEC connector interoperability.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求和GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，则须取得中国强制认证。中国CCC或GB/T测试证据可支持工程审查，但不能证明津巴布韦SAZ接受、ZERA合规、ZETDC接入批准或IEC接口互操作。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求和GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，則須取得中國強制認證。中國CCC或GB/T測試證據可支持工程審查，但不能證明辛巴威SAZ接受、ZERA合規、ZETDC接入批准或IEC接口互操作。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should map the Zimbabwe importer, HS code, charger type and rated voltage, radio or payment functions, cable and coupler accessories, IEC safety and EMC reports, English labelling, SAZ conformity route, ZERA project obligations, and ZETDC site connection requirements before asserting that a charger is Zimbabwe-ready. Because demand is early-stage, project finance and power-availability assumptions should be validated alongside technical conformity.
gap.zh: 出口商在宣称充电桩可进入津巴布韦前，应明确津巴布韦进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型和额定电压、无线或支付功能、电缆及耦合器附件、IEC安全/EMC报告、英文标签、SAZ合格评定路径、ZERA项目义务和ZETDC现场接入要求。由于需求仍处早期，应将项目融资和供电可用性假设与技术符合性一并验证。
gap.zht: 出口商在宣稱充電樁可進入辛巴威前，應明確辛巴威進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型和額定電壓、無線或支付功能、電纜及耦合器附件、IEC安全/EMC報告、英文標籤、SAZ合格評定路徑、ZERA項目義務和ZETDC現場接入要求。由於需求仍處早期，應將項目融資和供電可用性假設與技術符合性一併驗證。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — no blanket official EVSE whole-unit mandatory certification rule was confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; SAZ conformity, ZERA obligations, ZETDC connection approval, and tender or site requirements may each be mandatory for a specific product or project
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T and CCC evidence are not Zimbabwe market-access or project-approval substitutes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Zimbabwe market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify the SAZ conformity route, HS code, ZERA / ZETDC project requirements, IEC safety and EMC evidence, and power-availability plan for each charger deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足津巴布韦市场准入。应针对每个充电桩部署核实SAZ合格评定路径、HS编码、ZERA / ZETDC项目要求、IEC安全及EMC证据和供电可用性方案。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足辛巴威市場准入。應針對每個充電樁部署核實SAZ合格評定路徑、HS編碼、ZERA / ZETDC項目要求、IEC安全及EMC證據和供電可用性方案。

requirement_topic.en: Zimbabwe EV Deployment Context — Load-Shedding, Solar-Plus-Battery, and Conservative Demand Planning
requirement_topic.zh: 津巴布韦EV部署背景——限电、光储配置及保守需求规划
requirement_topic.zht: 辛巴威EV部署背景——限電、光儲配置及保守需求規劃

summary.en: Zimbabwe's EV charger opportunity should be framed cautiously. The vehicle base and public charging network are early-stage, while chronic electricity shortages and load-shedding can materially affect charger uptime. Fleet depots, mines, hotels, commercial sites, and private compounds may be more realistic near-term hosts than dense public charging networks. Many projects will need paired solar PV, battery storage, generator backup, load shedding schedules, or smart load management to provide predictable service.
summary.zh: 津巴布韦电动汽车充电桩机会应谨慎表述。当地车辆基数和公共充电网络仍处于早期，而长期电力短缺和限电会实质影响充电桩可用率。车队场站、矿区、酒店、商业场所和私人园区可能比密集公共充电网络更适合作为近期部署场景。许多项目将需要配套太阳能光伏、储能电池、发电机备用、限电计划或智能负载管理，以提供可预测服务。
summary.zht: 辛巴威電動汽車充電樁機會應謹慎表述。當地車輛基數和公共充電網絡仍處於早期，而長期電力短缺和限電會實質影響充電樁可用率。車隊場站、礦區、酒店、商業場所和私人園區可能比密集公共充電網絡更適合作為近期部署場景。許多項目將需要配套太陽能光伏、儲能電池、發電機備用、限電計劃或智能負載管理，以提供可預測服務。

standards_or_laws: ZERA electricity-sector regulation and published electricity materials
ZETDC connection and metering requirements for grid-connected sites
IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 / IEC 61000 technical evidence as project specifications require
Site-specific power-availability, backup-power, and load-management design

summary.en: China's EV charging deployment benefits from a large EV fleet, mature charging networks, and domestic GB/T charging infrastructure. Those market conditions do not transfer to Zimbabwe. A charger that is commercially proven in China still needs a Zimbabwe-specific business case, power-availability plan, local service strategy, and IEC connector / safety documentation.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电部署受益于庞大的EV保有量、成熟充电网络和国内GB/T充电基础设施。这些市场条件不能直接转移至津巴布韦。即使某充电桩已在中国商业验证，仍需要针对津巴布韦制定商业案例、供电可用性方案、本地服务策略，以及IEC接口和安全文件。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電部署受益於龐大的EV保有量、成熟充電網絡和國內GB/T充電基礎設施。這些市場條件不能直接轉移至辛巴威。即使某充電樁已在中國商業驗證，仍需要針對辛巴威制定商業案例、供電可用性方案、本地服務策略，以及IEC接口和安全文件。

standards_or_laws: China New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035

gap.en: The gap is not only certification. Zimbabwe deployments must validate utilization, grid availability, backup-energy cost, spare parts, installer competence, payment connectivity, and service response before committing to high-power DC infrastructure. Exporters should avoid assuming China-style public fast-charging economics and should separate pilot projects from national-scale claims.
gap.zh: 差距不只是认证。津巴布韦部署在投入大功率直流基础设施前，必须验证利用率、电网可用性、备用能源成本、备件、安装方能力、支付联网和服务响应。出口商不应假设中国式公共快充经济性，并应将试点项目与全国规模化宣称区分开来。
gap.zht: 差距不只是認證。辛巴威部署在投入大功率直流基礎設施前，必須驗證利用率、電網可用性、備用能源成本、備件、安裝方能力、支付聯網和服務響應。出口商不應假設中國式公共快充經濟性，並應將試點項目與全國規模化宣稱區分開來。

mandatory_status.target: Market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; technical, conformity, grid-connection, and site-power obligations remain independently applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV charging scale does not affect Zimbabwe conformity, grid, or business-case obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Zimbabwe EV charging should be scoped as early-stage infrastructure, often needing solar-plus-battery or other backup power. Technical compliance is necessary but not sufficient: power availability, service model, and realistic utilization assumptions must be validated before high-power rollout.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 津巴布韦电动汽车充电应按早期基础设施来界定，通常需要太阳能加电池或其他备用电源。技术合规是必要但不充分条件：在大功率铺开前，还必须验证供电可用性、服务模式和现实利用率假设。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 辛巴威電動汽車充電應按早期基礎設施來界定，通常需要太陽能加電池或其他備用電源。技術合規是必要但不充分條件：在大功率鋪開前，還必須驗證供電可用性、服務模式和現實利用率假設。
